text.title: Claude Code Hooks Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when claude-code-hooks is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), a root cause (`reason`), and a corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Hook attempts an interactive prompt; agent hangs.
antipattern.reason: Hook command uses a TTY-dependent tool.
antipattern.note: Fix: Use non-interactive flags; timeout the command; print to stderr.

antipattern.description: PreToolUse hook always passes 'because it's slow'; engineers disabled it.
antipattern.note: Fix: Move slow checks to PostToolUse (warn) + cron (deep audit); keep PreToolUse fast.

antipattern.description: Secrets escaped via Edit because the hook only matched Bash.
antipattern.note: Fix: Expand hook event matchers; cover Edit/Write/Bash that touch sensitive paths.
